allow:
Bash(powershell -File - << 'EOF'
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
$src = 'C:\\Users\\Gesta\\Pictures\\Screenshots\\Screenshot 2026-05-26 231353.png'
$dst = 'C:\\Users\\Gesta\\Pictures\\Screenshots\\ss_resized.png'
$orig = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($src\)
$ratio = 1800.0 / $orig.Width
$newH = [int]\($orig.Height * $ratio\)
$bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap $orig, 1800, $newH
$bmp.Save\($dst\)
$orig.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\)
Write-Host "done"
EOF)
